title: Core Documentation Family Registry

entries.summary: Durable shared foundation guidance authored under core/docs/foundations/.
entries.notes: Shared core owns the authored foundations source. Pack-owned mirrors or promoted pack-local variants belong in pack-local documentation-family registries instead of the reusable-core registry.

entries.summary: Human-authored workflow modules and workflow roles published under core/workflows.
entries.notes: Shared reusable workflow modules live under core/workflows/modules and shared workflow roles live under core/workflows/roles; pack-owned workflow guidance belongs in the owning pack workflow roots.

notes: This registry governs reusable-core documentation families only. Pack-owned documentation families belong in pack-local registries.
